tasks.context: npm audit reports uuid <14.0.0 through ldapts 7.4.0 after the non-breaking path-to-regexp fix. The available remediation requires ldapts 8.1.7, a major upgrade that must be validated against LDAP login, local fallback, config import/export and admin flows before applying.
Defined --danger as a single alias of the existing --error token in src/public/styles/00-foundation.css, preserving the current palette while restoring destructive dropdown and login error styling.

ProjectForm renders several labels without htmlFor/id associations for project and phase fields, while LoginScreen and SystemSettings already use explicit label/input wiring. Add stable ids and htmlFor links in src/client/components/ProjectForm.jsx for the existing fields without changing layout or copy.

ProjectList renders the import action as a styled label with a hidden file input. In the Playwright snapshot it appears as generic text ('Importa progetti') rather than a button/control, so keyboard and assistive-tech semantics are weaker than Export Progetti next to it. Replace or wrap it with an accessible button-like file trigger while preserving the current visual style and JSON import behavior.

AlertsPanel collapsible headers support click and Enter/Space, but do not expose aria-expanded or aria-controls. Browser snapshots show collapsed alert sections only communicate state through the '+' text. Add explicit expanded state and controlled region ids to the existing collapsible pattern.

On a 390px viewport after opening Demo, Playwright measured .gantt-with-sidebar at 292px wide and .project-sidebar still expanded at 260px, leaving only a narrow canvas area even though there is no page-level horizontal overflow. Adjust the existing responsive sidebar behavior for <=480px, for example by defaulting to collapsed unless the user has explicitly expanded it, without redesigning the Gantt layout.
Removed versioned .playwright-cli snapshots from the supported repository path and added .playwright-cli/, output/ and playwright-report/ to ignored/cleaned local artifact roots.

Removed unreferenced npm aliases that bypassed the canonical build/test/package entrypoints, documented scripts/ as principal, internal, Windows service, agents, legacy or removable, and kept npm run test/npm run pack as the supported verification and packaging paths.
Added deterministic brand asset generation for SVG logo, Windows icon sizes, ICO, common social image formats and WiX-style setup bitmaps under src/public/brand/ with operational documentation.
Removed the cmd.exe rmdir fallback from MSI cleanup helper so destructive cleanup remains in PowerShell with bounded retries.
